uin_code.source_quote: ManipalCigna ProHealth Insurance | Terms & Conditions | UIN: MCIHLIP24011V072324 | April 2023

min_entry_age.source_quote: Child entry standard 91 days (per Policy Schedule); per IRDAI Master Circular family floater entry

max_entry_age.source_quote: Adult entry per Policy Schedule (ProHealth typical: 18-65 years; Senior variants extend)

sum_insured_options.source_quote: For Sum Insured ₹7.5 Lacs and Above - Covered up to any Room Category (SI options per Policy Schedule)

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 30-day waiting period applies to illness (standard IRDAI clause)

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: applicable months (24 months for Preferred, Premier plan/ 36 months for Plus, Accumulate plan/ 48 months for Protect plan) of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Specified disease/procedure Waiting Period ... excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: except in case of opting for 'Reduction in maternity waiting period' where the limit will be relaxed to 24 months of waiting (default maternity waiting 36 months in Premier; opt-down to 24 months)

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-hospitalization Medical Expenses Covered up to 60 days before date of hospitalization

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post-hospitalization Medical Expenses Covered up to 180 days post discharge from hospital (Premier variant)

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: For the list of Day Care Treatments refer Annexure II of the Policy. (covered up to limit of SI opted)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Cover Covered up to full Sum Insured

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity Expenses covered under Premier/Preferred plans subject to maternity waiting period (restricted to two live children)

newborn_coverage.source_quote: Newborn baby cover available under maternity Sum Insured (Pre or post natal Maternity Expenses will be covered within the Maternity Sum Insured)

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Donor Expenses (Hospitalization Expenses of the donor providing the organ) Covered up to full Sum Insured

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus A guaranteed 25% increase in Sum Insured per policy year, maximum up to 200% of Sum Insured

restoration_benefit.value: Multiple Restoration (unlimited times in a policy year for unrelated illnesses)
restoration_benefit.source_quote: Restoration of Sum Insured ... Multiple Restoration is available in a Policy Year for unrelated illnesses in addition to the Sum Insured opted

room_rent_capping.value: Any Room Category except Suite or higher (for SI ≥ ₹7.5 Lacs)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: For Sum Insured ₹7.5 Lacs and Above - Covered up to any Room Category except Suite or higher category

copayment_pct.source_quote: Waiver of Mandatory co-payment of 20% for Insured Persons Aged 65 years and above (waiver optional; base copay 0% for under-65 entrants)

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Insurer-level metric; ManipalCigna advertises 8,500+ network hospitals

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility through Network Provider (standard definition)

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: TAT governed by IRDAI Master Circular

_meta.notes: ProHealth Prime maps to Premier variant under MCIHLIP24011V072324 (Preferred/Premier 24-month PED, premium tier with maternity + multiple restoration).
